articles.title: AG: Mass. to receive $730,000 from Cash App in alleged deception settlement
articles.description:
The company that owns Cash App allegedly not only failed to protect users from fraud but enabled it through promotions.

The post AG: Mass. to receive $730,000 from Cash App in alleged deception settlement appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts will receive $730,000 from Cash App for alleged user fraud deception.
The settlement addresses claims of Cash App promoting features that enabled fraud.
Boston residents may benefit from increased consumer protection measures following this settlement.
